args: cred="${MCP_CREDENTIAL_FILE:-$PWD/credential_mcp.env}"; if [ -f "$cred" ]; then exec docker mcp gateway run --servers github-official --secrets "$cred"; else exec docker mcp gateway run --servers github-official; fi

cred="${MCP_CREDENTIAL_FILE:-$PWD/credential_mcp.env}"; org="${AZURE_DEVOPS_ORG:-}"; if [ -f "$cred" ]; then org="$(awk -F= '/^AZURE_DEVOPS_ORG=/{print substr($0,index($0,"=")+1)}' "$cred")"; fi; test -n "$org" && npx -y @azure-devops/mcp "$org" -d core repositories pipelines
